summary: Frontend testing for vendor identity hiding and admin seller search features. All tests passed: (1) Admin sellers page search works correctly with seller_code, company name, city filters, (2) Public B2C catalog/PDP hides vendor names, (3) Brand portal catalog/PDP hides vendor names, (4) Agent dashboard skipped (OTP-based login).
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSellers.js: Search functionality working correctly - filters by seller_code, company_name, GSTIN, city, state, contact_email, contact_phone
AdminSellers.js: Seller cards display seller_code in blue mono text (line 284: text-[#2563EB] text-xs font-mono)
AdminSellers.js: Count indicator (data-testid=seller-search-count) shows 'X of Y match' format
AdminSellers.js: Clear button (data-testid=seller-search-clear) restores full list
FabricsPage.js (public catalog): No seller_company/seller_name references - vendor identity hidden
FabricDetailPage.js (public PDP): No seller_company/seller_name references - vendor identity hidden
BrandFabricDetail.js: Comments at lines 236, 404 confirm seller info intentionally hidden from brand users
AgentDashboardPage.js: Lines 572-579, 654-661 correctly show seller_company for internal staff (intentional)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor identity hiding feature fully implemented and tested. Admin sellers search works with all filter types (seller_code, company, city, GSTIN, contact). Agent dashboard requires OTP login - cannot be tested without email access but code review confirms seller_company is shown (intentional for internal staff).

features_verified.admin_sellers_search_count_indicator: PASS - data-testid=seller-search-count shows 'X of Y match'
features_verified.admin_sellers_seller_code_display: PASS - Blue mono text under company name
features_verified.public_catalog_vendor_hidden: PASS - No vendor company names visible
features_verified.public_pdp_vendor_hidden: PASS - No vendor company names visible
features_verified.brand_catalog_vendor_hidden: PASS - No vendor company names visible
features_verified.brand_pdp_vendor_hidden: PASS - No vendor company names visible
features_verified.locofast_branding_present: PASS - Watermark visible on all fabric images
features_verified.agent_dashboard_shows_vendor: SKIPPED - OTP login required, but code review confirms seller_company shown (lines 572-579, 654-661)
